context_en: The client asked for more details after the demo, but no one replied immediately. I promised to follow up with a clear summary before the end of the day.
target_sentence: I promised to follow up with a clear summary before the end of the day.
context_zh: 客户在演示后要求更多细节，但没人马上回复。我承诺在当天结束前跟进并发送清晰总结。
usage_note: follow up 常用于邮件、会议、销售、客户沟通后的后续跟进。

context_en: The bug was reported last week, but the status was still unclear. The project manager asked me to follow up with the testing team.
target_sentence: The project manager asked me to follow up with the testing team.
context_zh: 这个 bug 上周已经报告了，但状态仍不清楚。项目经理让我和测试团队追查进展。
usage_note: follow up with someone 表示向某人跟进情况。

context_en: The developer was working on a difficult task alone. I checked in with him in the afternoon to see whether he needed help.
target_sentence: I checked in with him in the afternoon to see whether he needed help.
context_zh: 那位开发人员独自处理一个困难任务。我下午和他确认进度，看看他是否需要帮助。
usage_note: check in with someone 常用于关心进度、状态或困难。

context_en: When we arrived at the client’s office, we had to check in at reception before going upstairs.
target_sentence: We had to check in at reception before going upstairs.
context_zh: 我们到达客户办公室后，必须先在前台登记，然后才能上楼。
usage_note: check in 也可表示在前台、酒店、会议处登记。

context_en: We had not spoken since the requirements changed. I suggested a quick call to touch base before we started development.
target_sentence: I suggested a quick call to touch base before we started development.
context_zh: 需求变更后我们还没有沟通过。我建议在开始开发前简单通个电话。
usage_note: touch base 表示短暂沟通、同步一下。

context_en: The account manager had been away for two weeks. After returning, she touched base with every major customer.
target_sentence: She touched base with every major customer.
context_zh: 客户经理离开了两周。回来后，她和每个重要客户重新联系了一下。
usage_note: 常用于维护客户、同事、合作伙伴关系。

context_en: I did not have the answer during the meeting, so I told the client I would get back to them after checking with the team.
target_sentence: I told the client I would get back to them after checking with the team.
context_zh: 会议中我没有答案，所以我告诉客户我会和团队确认后回复他们。
usage_note: get back to someone 是职场邮件和会议中非常常见的回复表达。

context_en: After the urgent production issue was fixed, I got back to the report I had started in the morning.
target_sentence: I got back to the report I had started in the morning.
context_zh: 紧急生产问题修好后，我回到早上开始写的报告。
usage_note: get back to something 表示重新回到某项任务。

context_en: The new supplier looked promising, so our procurement manager reached out to ask for a quotation.
target_sentence: Our procurement manager reached out to ask for a quotation.
context_zh: 这家新供应商看起来不错，所以我们的采购经理联系他们询价。
usage_note: reach out 表示主动联系，语气比 contact 更自然。

context_en: I was unsure about the deployment process, so I reached out to the DevOps team for guidance.
target_sentence: I reached out to the DevOps team for guidance.
context_zh: 我不确定部署流程，所以向 DevOps 团队寻求指导。
usage_note: reach out to someone for help 表示向某人求助。

context_en: The client wanted to discuss the new requirements, so I set up a meeting for Friday morning.
target_sentence: I set up a meeting for Friday morning.
context_zh: 客户想讨论新需求，所以我安排了周五上午的会议。
usage_note: set up a meeting/call 表示安排会议或电话。

context_en: Before testing the API, we set up a separate environment with test data.
target_sentence: We set up a separate environment with test data.
context_zh: 测试 API 前，我们配置了一个带测试数据的独立环境。
usage_note: set up 也常用于配置系统、环境、账户或工具。

context_en: The team kicked off the new migration project with a short planning session.
target_sentence: The team kicked off the new migration project with a short planning session.
context_zh: 团队通过一个简短的计划会议启动了新的迁移项目。
usage_note: kick off 常用于项目、会议、活动开始。

context_en: The manager kicked off the meeting by reviewing last week’s progress.
target_sentence: The manager kicked off the meeting by reviewing last week’s progress.
context_zh: 经理通过回顾上周进度开始了会议。
usage_note: kick off by doing something 表示以某事作为开始。
